cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is being taught to open a mini-fridge that has a rope tied to the handle. The dog is tugging the rope and the fridge door is opening. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A clear shot of the dog successfully opening the fridge door using the rope.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A specific can (e.g., a can of soda) inside the fridge has a special koozie or fabric wrap around it to make it easy for the dog to grab with its mouth without puncturing it. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A close-up shot inside the fridge, highlighting the specially prepared can.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The dog is taught to gently take only the wrapped can from the fridge, ignoring other items. The trainer rewards this specific retrieval. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera follows the dog as it carefully selects and removes the correct can.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The dog brings the can to the owner, who is sitting on the sofa, and gently gives it to them. Jackpot reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A satisfying shot of the successful delivery and the happy owner giving a huge reward.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a person watching a football game, saying "Cerveja, por favor!", and the dog proudly delivering the can. Text overlay: "O Melhor Companheiro de Jogo do Mundo". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A fun, cinematic shot that looks like a beer commercial. The text appears with a cool, sporty font.
